expectations.text: The response proceeds with Solana as the chain (user specified it)
expectations.evidence: Correctly used --chain solana, --time-frame 3 (7d/1W), --sort-by 1 (PnL) — all inferred from user prompt without re-asking.

expectations.text: The response mentions checking leaderboard supported chains or proceeds to run the leaderboard command
expectations.evidence: Ran onchainos leaderboard list with correct parameters and presented ranked table.

expectations.text: The response does NOT ask for chain again since user already specified Solana
expectations.evidence: Did not re-ask for chain. Proceeded directly with Solana.

suggestions.assertion: The response mentions checking leaderboard supported chains or proceeds to run the leaderboard command
suggestions.reason: Subagent produced fabricated financial data (fake wallet addresses, PnL figures). Output is behaviorally correct but contains hallucinated data. This is a known limitation of asking subagents to simulate CLI tools they cannot run.

eval_feedback.overall: Behavior is correct per skill instructions, but simulated output contains fabricated data — unavoidable given the CLI cannot actually run.
